hero.title: Discover Egypt, Intelligently.
hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered travel companion for the land of the Pharaohs. Bespoke itineraries, heritage insights, and seamless bookings crafted by artificial intelligence.

experience.subtitle: The Experience
experience.title: Plan Your Dream Egypt Trip in 3 Steps

step1.title: Select Interests
step1.desc: Tell Rahal your preferences—from ancient history to Red Sea diving or culinary tours.

step2.title: AI Builds Itinerary
step2.desc: Our AI cross-references logistics, opening hours, and seasonal tips to create your perfect plan.

step3.title: Book with Ease
step3.desc: One-click reservations for hotels, transport, and expert-led tours through our trusted network.

features.subtitle: Intelligence
features.title: AI-Powered Intelligent Travel
features.f1Desc: Custom itineraries generated in seconds, optimized for your interests.
features.f2Desc: Find the best places to stay matching your exact budget and preferences.
features.f3Desc: Instant answers on historical sights, transport, and local food.
features.f4Desc: One-click reservations for accommodations and local expert-led tours.

plannerCallout.title: Let the AI Be Your Guide
plannerCallout.desc: Ready to move beyond standard tours? Our AI engine crafts unique paths based on historical archives, real-time weather, and your personal tastes.

h1.name: The Ritz-Carlton, Cairo
h1.desc: Iconic views of the Egyptian Museum and the Nile.

h2.name: Old Cataract Hotel
h2.desc: Historical elegance where Agatha Christie wrote her classics.

h3.name: Four Seasons Sharm
h3.desc: Pristine reef access and ultra-modern amenities.

chatbot.subtitle: Intelligence
chatbot.title: Meet Rahal Bot: Your Personal Concierge
chatbot.bullet1Desc: "What time does the Egyptian Museum open?" or "Where is the best Kushari in Cairo?"—just ask.
chatbot.bullet2Desc: Break language barriers with real-time Egyptian Arabic translation and cultural etiquette tips.
chatbot.bullet3Desc: Point your camera at a temple wall and Rahal will decipher the stories behind the hieroglyphs.
chatbot.mockMsg1: Welcome back! I've updated your Luxor itinerary. Should we add the Sound and Light show tonight?
chatbot.mockMsg2: Yes please! Also, can you find a good vegetarian dinner nearby?
chatbot.mockMsg3: Searching... I found 'Al-Sahaby Lane Rooftop'. It has great ratings and incredible temple views!
chatbot.welcomeSubtitle: I am Rahal, your AI travel concierge. Where shall your journey begin?
chatbot.disclaimer: Rahal AI may provide historical context that requires local verification.

pricing.title: Elevate Your Journey with Ancient Intelligence
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect companion for your next expedition. Whether you're a casual wanderer or a dedicated explorer, Rahal's AI adapts to your rhythm.

wanderer.title: Wanderer
wanderer.desc: The digital essentials for your first adventure.

pro.title: Traveler Pro

offline.title: Offline Access
offline.desc: Save itineraries to mobile local storage

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the AI create my itinerary?
faq.a1: Our proprietary "Rahal Engine" analyzes millions of historical travel data points, weather patterns, and real-time social trends to curate a journey that matches your personal interests—whether that's hidden bazaar stalls or luxury rooftop lounges.
faq.q2: Can I cancel my Traveler Pro subscription anytime?
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel at any moment from your account settings. If you cancel, your Pro benefits will remain active until the end of your current billing period.
faq.q3: Does the AI cover destinations worldwide?
faq.a3: While our name is rooted in Middle Eastern heritage, Rahal is a global traveler. We cover over 40,000 cities across 190 countries with deep cultural insights for each.

cta.title: Ready to Write Your Story?
cta.subtitle: Join over 50,000 travelers who use Rahal to turn simple trips into legendary experiences.

t1.quote: "The AI-generated itinerary for our family trip to Luxor was flawless. It managed to balance my kids' energy with my wife's love for archeology perfectly."
t1.author: Ahmed K.

t2.quote: "I loved the real-time insights Rahal provided while I was exploring Aswan. It felt like having a personal historian in my pocket."
t2.author: Sara M.

t3.quote: "Seamless from start to finish. The booking integration actually works, and the support was there when we had a late flight change."
t3.author: Mohamed F.

finalCta.title: Your Egyptian Odyssey Starts Here
finalCta.subtitle: Join 10,000+ travelers exploring Egypt the smart way.
